title: malvastrum scabrum var. genuinum
intro: Malvastrum scabrum var. genuinum, also known as a type of cistus or rockrose, is a flowering plant species native to the Mediterranean region. It has been used in traditional medicine for its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, which can help to soothe wounds, reduce fever, and combat infections. The plant's health benefits include reducing inflammation, fighting off bacteria, and promoting wound healing, making it a valuable natural remedy for various health conditions. Herbal preparations of Malvastrum scabrum var. genuinum include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of ailments, from skin issues to respiratory problems.
